breakdown: This PR fixes rewards box normalization in streaming passthrough by adding fallback logic to handle alternative key names ('xp'/'xp_gained', 'gold_pieces'/'gold'). The naming is clear with descriptive variables like raw_xp/raw_gold. Error handling uses appropriate defaults. Type safety is weak with no TypedDict or explicit type annotations. Test coverage is strong with a real E2E test that validates the fix works end-to-end.
key_changes: Add fallback logic in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui to accept 'xp' as alternative to 'xp_gained' and 'gold_pieces' as alternative to 'gold'
Pop unnecessary alternative keys after normalization to clean up the payload
Call normalize_rewards_box_for_ui in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair for passthrough rewards
Add E2E test file that exercises the normalization with real LLM and verifies output has standardized keys
